articles.title_en: Transport companies in 35 Russian regions raise fares or cut routes amid fuel crisis, iStories reports
articles.lead_en: Public transit fares have risen in 25 Russian regions, while carriers in another 10 have cut routes or reduced service schedules amid the fuel crisis, iStories, an independent Russian investigative outlet, reported, citing its own calculations.

articles.title_en: Meet the new app helping Russians find gas amid the country’s fuel crisis
articles.lead_en: Against the backdrop of Russia’s fuel crisis, large companies like Yandex and Sberbank, as well as individual enthusiasts, have been developing tools to help Russians find gas stations that still have fuel. A few weeks ago, an app called “GdeBENZ” appeared in the App Store and RuStore, and it became more popular than its larger, better-known counterpart, Yandex Zapravki, with remarkable speed.
